sections.description: Connects this WordPress site to Claude Code via a session token + REST API.
sections.changelog:
1.3.0

  • Static token mode: set a permanent token via the CLAUDE_BRIDGE_STATIC_TOKEN wp-config constant (no expiry, no single-client lock); access still gated by the IP allowlist.

1.2.0

  • Renamed to WP Claude Agent.
  • IP allowlist: lock the bridge to specific IPs via the CLAUDE_BRIDGE_IP_ALLOWLIST wp-config constant.

1.1.0

  • Self-hosted auto-update via channel.json.
  • Per-site changelog on the MCP side.
